label: June 2026
digest: June 2026: The mass market is leading. Suburbs and city-fringe are rising and central HDB towns are up sharply, while prime is the only segment falling. Private homes average $1,753 psf, up 3.8% over the year (0.6% this month). By segment over three months, the suburbs (OCR) moved 1.4%, city fringe (RCR) 0.6%, and prime (CCR) -2.4%. HDB resale is around $605 psf, up 0.3% year on year. Strongest town: Marine Parade at +11.0%. Rental yields run about 3.6% private and 6.1% HDB. New launches average $2,361 psf. ABSD is 20% on a citizen's second home and 60% for foreigners.
